key_risks: HIGH: Unexpected capability for code_runner skill: network (M1)
MEDIUM: Dynamic code execution via re.compile() (S6)

findings.title: Dynamic code execution via re.compile()
findings.description: Code uses re.compile() to execute dynamically constructed code
findings.code_snippet:
# URL detection patterns
URL_PATTERN = re.compile(r'https?://[^\s<>"{}|\\^`\[\]]+:\d+')
CHN_KEYWORDS = ["设置", "连接", "地址", "url", "server", "链接"]
findings.remediation: Use ast.literal_eval() for safe evaluation. Avoid re.compile() with untrusted input.

findings.title: Unexpected capability for code_runner skill: network
findings.description: A 'code_runner' skill would not normally require 'network' capability. Allowed capabilities for this category: file_read, file_write, shell
findings.remediation: Review why a code_runner skill needs network access.
